families.label: FX Stress
families.description: Currency crisis or severe depreciation during the 2024-2025 holdout
labelSources: Frozen 2024-2025 reference set curated from IMF AREAER exchange-arrangement reporting and IMF country surveillance notes on major devaluations.

families.label: Sovereign Stress
families.description: Sovereign credit downgrade or debt restructuring 2024-2025
labelSources: Frozen 2024-2025 reference set curated from IMF sovereign-debt restructuring/program material plus major rating-agency default and downgrade actions.

families.label: Power Outages
families.description: Major grid or infrastructure outage during the 2024-2025 holdout
labelSources: Frozen 2024-2025 reference set curated from country-scale grid-crisis reports in IEA electricity analysis, ReliefWeb/OCHA humanitarian updates, and national operator/government notices.

families.label: Food Crisis Escalation
labelSources: Live Redis payload from resilience:static:fao, sourced from the IPC/FAO food-crisis seeding path.

families.label: Refugee Surges
labelSources: Live Redis payload from displacement:summary:v1:<year>, sourced from the UNHCR displacement summary seeding path.

families.label: Sanctions Shocks
families.description: Comprehensive sanctions target during the 2024-2025 holdout
labelSources: Frozen 2024-2025 reference set curated from OFAC sanctions-list targeting, EU Sanctions Map regimes, and UN/EU/US comprehensive sanctions program coverage.

families.label: Conflict Spillover
families.description: Armed conflict spreading to a previously-stable neighbor
labelSources: Live Redis payload from conflict:ucdp-events:v1, sourced from the UCDP event seeding path.
